headline: Hershey Unifies Operations And Bets On Reese’s March Madness Momentum
summary: Hershey is rolling out a unified U.S. commercial operating model called ONE Hershey, bringing its Sweet, Salty, and Protein brands under a single structure. The company is also launching a major NCAA March Madness program for Reese's that links bracket outcomes to prizes and on site fan experiences. These moves aim to deepen customer partnerships and increase consumer engagement around one of Hershey's most visible brands. For investors watching Hershey, NYSE:HSY, these updates come with...
